data.content: Fixed two bugs in notification bell: 1) Beat IDs now show full prefix (e.g. foolery-xmvb instead of just xmvb) so users can identify which project a notification is from. 2) Clicking a beat link from a different project now auto-switches activeRepo to the correct project before navigating, preventing beat not found errors. Changes in: beat-navigation.ts (added extractBeatPrefix), notification-bell.tsx (show full ID + switch repo on click), beat-navigation.test.ts (tests for extractBeatPrefix).
